programmes.show_description: The Young Parent Trap: Lois and Peter are mistaken for young parents at Stewie's school and are invited to live in a millennial apartment complex, leaving Meg and Chris home alone.
Holly Bibble: The Griffins find themselves stuck in a hotel room due to a massive storm. They pass the time by re-imagining three stories from the Bible.
Flush After Reading: When Francine escapes embarrassment and gets lost in a good book - or five - with Roger, Stan reluctantly spends time at the library.
Hot Scoomp: US animated comedy series. Hayley searches for guidance and instead finds a community of 'cool butts'.
Radio No You Didn't: Animated comedy. The unearthing of an old radio in Bob and Linda's bedroom cupboard leads Bob to tell his family a story of Second World War espionage.
Crows Encounters of the Bird Kind: Animated comedy. Tina tries to get a birdwatching badge for her Thundergirls sash but runs afoul of a ranger and endangers some local birds.
Hi-tech impressions show. Beyonce enlists Priyanka Chopra's support to deal with Billie Eilish disturbing the peace, and Mark Wahlberg and Chris Rock's friendship is rocked.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Shopping from home.
The Siren's Song: Animated adventures. Velma investigates after Amy, her new merwoman friend, tells her that fish freaks have been attacking boats in Crystal Cove harbour.
The Menace of Manticore: Animated adventures. Creepy Spooky Terror Land is beset by a manticore, a beast with the body of a dragon, the face of a man, and the tail of a scorpion.
El Bandito: Animated series. The gang attends a Day of the Dead festival in Mexico, where Fred attempts to capture the ghost of the criminal, El Bandito.
Into the Mouth of Madcap: Animated series. Daphne babysits for her friend's son, but Fred is eager to crack the next case.
Matt Edmondson narrates this series about the most entertaining Guinness World Records and the brilliant characters who set them as captured by TV shows around the globe.
Reality series. Dan tells his mum that he is missing Ella as she, Saff, Joe, Junaid and Becks go to a jungle retreat in Bali, and Freddie makes an apology that could isolate Harry.
Reality series. Love is in the air as the Bali trip comes to a close and Jordan surprises Sophie with a lavish romantic date, but will Sophie think a proposal is on the cards?
Reality series. The Bali gang are back in Essex and everyone is reunited. Dan and Ella are delighted to be together again and head off for a romantic getaway.
Reality show. Princess Andre opens up about the press backlash following the first series, catches up with friend Heidi Katona, and spends time with brothers Harvey and Junior.
Reality series. Princess takes brave new steps towards independence as she goes house-hunting, starts singing lessons, and dips her toe in the online dating pool on a dating app.
Rob Brydon hosts the grand finale of the game show as the final nine players battle it out for the 50,000-pound jackpot.
The search for the most spectacular entertainers to hit these shores continues in Blackpool as more hopefuls are welcomed by award-winning hosts Ant & Dec and face the judges.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Tom Allen, Fleur East, and Simon Gregson all trying to 'say what they see' in aid of their chosen charity.
Animated adventure comedy film sequel featuring the voices of Chris Rock and Ben Stiller, 2008. The Madagascar animals try to fly home but end up in a nature reserve instead.

Action-adventure film sequel starring Chris Pratt and Bryce Dallas Howard, 2022. Biosyn operatives try to locate Maisie Lockwood following the destruction of Isla Nublar.
Meg Goes to College: Meg is admitted to Brown University, but after being suspended for her application being a fraud, has to prove she deserves to be there.
Movin' In (Principal Shepherd's Song): Principal Shephard moves in with the Griffins after losing his job for fat-shaming Chris.
Silicon Steve: US animated comedy series. Steve starts a social media site for young people, but he ends up trying to take his site down when adults take over his company.
Comb Over: A Hair Piece: US animated comedy series. Stan does something about his secret baldness and gets the help of Josay Bosay, Roger's famed hairstylist-to-the-stars persona.
It's Dave's turn to take on the Banker for a chance at the 100,000-pound jackpot as Stephen Mulhern hosts the iconic game show with only one question.
Stephen Mulhern welcomes Jade as she gets ready to face the Banker and tries to beat him at his own game to take a life-changing jackpot home.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Shopping from home.
Attack of the Headless Horror: Animated adventures. Adventurer Rick Spartan is followed to town by the Headless Creature, an Amazon monster who believes Rick has taken his head.
A Haunting in Crystal Cove: Animated adventures. Mayor Jones is under attack by a poltergeist in his own home, and the only ones who can help him are Scooby and the gang.
The Norse Case Scenario: Animated series. The gang goes on a camping trip to hone their mystery skills, but Viking ghosts attack and attempt to drive them away.
The People vs Fred Jones: Animated adventure series. Fred is on trial after being accused of being the real mastermind behind all the mysteries he's solved, but can Daphne save him?
Waterside Dwelling Niagara: House-hunting show. An estate agent is under pressure to help her parents find a property that will become their forever home.
Stripper Darren hopes to be impressed by the style choices of three potential suitors, Loren, Trudian and Brooke.
Reality series. The gang throw Elma and Sammy a 'welcome home' brunch, and Saff tells Harry that she doesn't like the way he is acting after breaking up with Freddie.
Reality series. Love is blossoming as the Essex couples go from strength to strength. Elma and Sammy enjoy a double date with Roman and Matilda and Dan and Ella take the next step.
Reality series. Princess faces big decisions on moving out, money, and her beauty launch while also going on a girls' holiday to Dubai after facing an online backlash from a post.
Reality series. Princess continues her Dubai holiday and quest for a million followers before she and Junior are stunned by news of their mum's engagement and a possible truce.
Graham Norton invites barrister Daniel, site manager Lorraine, and software sales rep Nicole to take on the iconic Wheel and tackle a series of puzzles for a shot at 50,000 pounds.
Kimberley Walsh, David Walliams and Emma Willis line up to say what they see - with the help of their mums - and all hope to win thousands of pounds for charity.
